name: MasterKodi AI Subs
changelog: AI translation now integrated into DarkSubs' auto-translate: when no Hebrew subtitle exists, it downloads the best-matching English sub and translates it with our Gemini engine (gender-aware) instead of Google. Set 'מקור תרגום' = MasterKodi AI (Gemini). Falls back to Google if AI is unavailable. No conflict with Hebrew sources - only runs when there really is no Hebrew.
